blocks.text: had read it as nostalgia at the time. He was less sure about that now.
held that. Measuring someone takes intention. That was different from just being present.
wasn't sure what she had known before she asked. The look in that moment had been specific.
carried it forward without naming it.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: You're walking along the beach in a very specific direction.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: It's the only direction. It's a beach.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: Second floor. Far left. That light went off before nine.
The rest of the house was still going — voices carrying, music on the porch, everyone else exactly where I'd left them. But one room had gone quiet early. And he hadn't said goodnight to anyone.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: He left the table at eight forty-seven.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: He was tired. He's been tired since Friday.

blocks.prompt: Marcus went to bed before nine. Does Julian keep thinking about it?

options.label: He files it. He doesn't know why yet.
He lets it go. It's just a window.
